indicators.name: red leather sofas
indicators.rationale: Red leather sofas are too soft and may cause discomfort during yoga practice.

indicators.name: metal coffee table
indicators.rationale: Metal coffee table is too hard and may cause discomfort during yoga practice.

indicators.name: glass vase on coffee table
indicators.rationale: Glass vase on coffee table is too fragile and may break during yoga practice.

indicators.name: open floor area
indicators.rationale: Open floor area is suitable for yoga practice.

indicators.name: large windows
indicators.rationale: Large windows allow natural light to enter the room.

reasoning_summary: The scene is marginally adequate for yoga practice due to the presence of soft and hard furniture that may cause discomfort. However, the open floor area and large windows contribute positively to the suitability of the space for yoga.
